sentences.target: Le cœur est un organe vital.

translations.fr: Le cœur est un organe vital.
translations.en: The heart is a vital organ.
translations.es: El corazón es un órgano vital.
translations.de: Das Herz ist ein lebenswichtiges Organ.
translations.it: Il cuore è un organo vitale.
translations.pt: O coração é um órgão vital.
translations.vi: Trái tim là một cơ quan thiết yếu.
translations.nl: Het hart is een vitaal orgaan.
translations.ja: 心臓は重要な臓器です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine singular; marks specificity of the noun 'cœur' as the subject.
Common noun; masculine singular; functions as the sentence subject.
Copular auxiliary; present tense, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article; masculine singular; introduces the predicate noun 'organe'.
Common noun; masculine singular; head of the predicate nominal phrase.
Adjective; masculine singular; modifies 'organe' within the predicate nominal.

sentences.target: Nous étudions chaque organe du corps.

translations.fr: Nous étudions chaque organe du corps.
translations.en: We study each organ of the body.
translations.de: Wir lernen jedes Organ des Körpers kennen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们学习身体的每个器官。
translations.yue: 我哋學習身體嘅每個器官。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi học về từng cơ quan của cơ thể.
translations.ar: نحن ندرس كل عضو في الجسم.
translations.nl: We bestuderen elk orgaan van het lichaam.
translations.hu: A test minden egyes szervét tanulmányozzuk.
translations.hi: हम शरीर के प्रत्येक अंग का अध्ययन करते हैं.
translations.pl: Uczymy się o każdym narządzie ciała.
translations.nb: Vi studerer hvert organ i kroppen.
translations.sv: Vi studerar varje organ i kroppen.
translations.da: Vi studerer hvert organ i kroppen.
translations.ja: 私たちは体の各臓器を勉強します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 1st person plural; subject of the verb.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, taking 'organe' as direct object.
Distributive determiner; selects a singular noun ('organe') while quantifying over a set.
Common noun; masculine singular; direct object of 'étudions'.
Preposition (contracted form of 'de + le'); introduces the genitive/complement 'du corps'.
Common noun; masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: Cet organe est inflammé, mais rien de grave.
sentences.reading: /sɛt ɔʁɡan ɛ.t‿ɛ̃.fla.me, mɛ ʁjɛ̃ də ɡʁav/

translations.fr: Cet organe est inflammé, mais rien de grave.
translations.ipa: /sɛt ɔʁɡan ɛ.t‿ɛ̃.fla.me, mɛ ʁjɛ̃ də ɡʁav/
translations.en: This organ is inflamed, but nothing serious.
translations.es: Este órgano está inflamado, pero no es nada grave.
translations.de: Dieses Organ ist entzündet, aber es ist nichts Schlimmes.
translations.it: Questo organo è infiammato, ma non è niente di grave.
translations.ko: 이 장기에 염증이 있지만 심각하지는 않습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个器官发炎了，但没什么大碍。
translations.yue: 呢個器官發炎咗，但冇咩大礙。
translations.ru: Этот орган воспалён, но это не серьёзно.
translations.pt: Este órgão está inflamado, mas não é nada grave.
translations.he: האיבר הזה מודלק, אבל זה לא חמור.
translations.tr: Bu organ iltihaplanmış, ama ciddi bir şey değil.
translations.vi: Cơ quan này bị viêm, nhưng không có gì nghiêm trọng.
translations.ar: هذا العضو ملتهب، لكنه ليس خطيراً.
translations.nl: Dit orgaan is ontstoken, maar het is niets ernstigs.
translations.uk: Цей орган запалений, але це не серйозно.
translations.hu: Ez a szerv gyulladt, de nem súlyos.
translations.hi: इस अंग में सूजन है, लेकिन यह गंभीर नहीं है.
translations.pl: Ten narząd jest zapalony, ale to nic poważnego.
translations.el: Αυτό το όργανο έχει φλεγμονή, αλλά δεν είναι κάτι σοβαρό.
translations.nb: Dette organet er betent, men det er ikke alvorlig.
translations.id: Organ ini meradang, tapi tidak serius.
translations.sv: Det här organet är inflammerat, men det är inget allvarligt.
translations.ro: Acest organ este inflamat, dar nu este nimic grav.
translations.cs: Tento orgán je zanícený, ale není to nic vážného.
translations.da: Dette organ er betændt, men det er ikke alvorligt.
translations.fi: Tämä elin on tulehtunut, mutta se ei ole vakavaa.
translations.ja: この臓器は炎症を起こしていますが、深刻ではありません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; masculine singular; agrees with 'organe' and points to a specific referent.
Common noun; masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary; present tense, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate adjective.
Past participle used adjectivally; masculine singular; predicate adjective describing 'organe'.
Coordinating conjunction; introduces a contrastive clause.
Indefinite negative pronoun; head of an elliptical phrase meaning 'nothing serious'.
Preposition; partitive 'de' following 'rien' to link with an adjective.
Adjective; invariable in gender; complements 'rien' via partitive construction.

sentences.target: On évite d'abîmer un organe important.

translations.fr: On évite d'abîmer un organe important.
translations.en: We avoid damaging an important organ.
translations.de: Wir vermeiden, ein wichtiges Organ zu schädigen.
translations.it: Evitiamo di danneggiare un organo importante.
translations.ko: 우리는 중요한 장기를 손상시키는 것을 피합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们避免损伤重要的器官。
translations.yue: 我哋避免損傷重要嘅器官。
translations.tr: Önemli bir organa zarar vermekten kaçınırız.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tránh làm tổn hại đến một cơ quan quan trọng.
translations.nl: We vermijden het beschadigen van een belangrijk orgaan.
translations.hi: हम एक महत्वपूर्ण अंग को नुकसान पहुँचाने से बचते हैं.
translations.el: Αποφεύγουμε να βλάψουμε ένα σημαντικό όργανο.
translations.nb: Vi unngår å skade et viktigt organ.
translations.sv: Vi undviker att skada ett viktigt organ.
translations.ro: Evităm să vătămăm un organ important.
translations.da: Vi undgår at skade et vigtigt organ.
translations.ja: 私たちは重要な臓器を傷つけないようにします。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; colloquially 'we'; 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive introduced by elided preposition 'de' (clitic 'd''); complement of 'évite'.
Indefinite article; masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun; masculine singular; direct object of 'd'abîmer'.
Adjective; masculine singular; modifies 'organe' attributively.
